{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231921509F0FAC77AFB4281A5117"}"},"total":1761},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7531666092639994649","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"相信我，第一本一直追下去的，写得很好，文笔可以的不幼稚，没有踩我的雷，一点都没踩，不喜欢网恋男扮女装的可以看一看因为这个不一样，信我，这次真的不一样，具体就来看吧。我书架上这么多本书，这是唯一一本让我一直追的，我相信我会把她它追到完结。作者大大加油加油加油！！","text_exts":[{"e":50,"s":46,"text":"男扮女装","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%94%B7%E6%89%AE%E5%A5%B3%E8%A3%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774264910281A5117%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227531666092639994649%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227512661266012326937%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%94%B7%E6%89%AE%E5%A5%B3%E8%A3%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753607499,"group_id":"7512661266012326937","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我就要看，人生就仨字儿:","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+b+ZMrNRoUVYNA7YeQxY89bk0kVO77GIxjX/cDewFaP","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/357f09182346441a82aea10ccdb3711f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789604&x-signature=MeW7PZXRCtnR1SgCDsgNUHvDwUI%3D","user_id":"2692031701067560","user_name":"777狒狒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2692031701067560","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7512661266012326937","book_info":{"abstract":"评分低是因为才出，会涨起来的
【双男主➕双洁➕网恋翻车➕傲娇受】
谢燃是联盟最负盛名的中单新人王，长得帅操作强，出道一年就带着HX横扫季后赛拿下两个冠军，风光得不可一世。
　　直到YK战队的打野江星言回国，比他高比他帅不说，首发第一场就把他打了个负战绩。
　　更可恶的是，在YK夺冠的当天，他亲耳听到江星言对自己出言不逊，给出了“实在一般，真不知道在狂什么”的评价。
　　打又打不过骂又不能骂，谢燃憋着一肚子火没处撒，然后当天晚上，他就刷到了一个网恋的帖子，对方男扮女装骗钱骗心，还把博主一个人骗到陌生城市奔现，直接把博主气进了医院。
　　谢燃对博主的遭遇表示深感同情，然后连夜找到了自己的游戏小号给江星言发了好友申请，开启了白天看不惯死对头，晚上哥哥长哥哥短勾引死对头的生活。
　　后来—
　　谢燃被江星言抵在墙上，对方手指轻摸他的嘴唇：“不是喜欢叫哥哥吗？怎么不叫了？”
　　谢燃欲哭无泪：“我错了哥，我是男的……”
　　江星言低头吻他：“男的我也喜欢你。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ee20dca3c23f42a61e3b2ffadf8dc62b","author":"加冰茉莉奶绿","author_id":"","book_id":"7512661266012326937","book_name":"玩女号撩到大神后跑不掉了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8d8d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7512673161574367769","read_count":"25518","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"554084"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"248","tags":"双男主,直播,电竞,双洁,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/77938ad856688a6f97a6f7d196cdc71e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448910&x-signature=XQFPBYhcnM0MdCMzN1z8ga43gxg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3861897825223059","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"71"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231921509F0FAC77AFB4281A5117"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":50,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_
